TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Vahu Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Vahu a niyaro', 38 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 102 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 101 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun83%, Amis7%, Paiwan2%, roma7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~vańßo~u~u itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u b~vańßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Vahu Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Vahu a niyaro', 38 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 102 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 101 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun83%, Amis7%, Paiwan2%, roma7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~vańßo~u~u itiniaj i ńßai…¨~…ģo~u~uan ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u b~vańßo~u~u a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
